title: helygia paddisonii
intro: Helygia paddisonii, also known as the Helichrysum, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region and southern Africa. The medicinal properties of Helygia paddisonii lie in its essential oils, particularly neryl acetate and 1,8-cineole, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of using Helygia paddisonii include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Helygia paddisonii include essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions, digestive problems, and respiratory diseases.
